title: E2E test requires manual run
body: The E2E test at tests/e2e/start-page-redesign.e2e.spec.ts was written to validate the new landing page sections but cannot be run in the automated CI pipeline without a running dev server. Manual verification is needed: pnpm exec playwright test tests/e2e/start-page-redesign.e2e.spec.ts
rationale: The test file was created to define expected behavior but E2E tests require a live dev server to run
